en: You are getting this category because you selected ISO 28000:2022 in the Avetta PQF - ISO Certifications Questionnaire\n\nISO Certificates issued for the a prior standard that are still valid and not expired will be accepted. If your organization also has a country specific certificate that is equivalent to the ISO Standard listed below, that certification will also be accepted as long as it is still valid.
ISO 28000 - Specification for Security Management Systems for the Supply Chain
Please upload your ISO 28000:2022 - Specification for Security Management Systems for the Supply Chain certificate:
Please enter the certificate expiration date:\n
